result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 9:     AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
                               ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-10'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    old_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM base
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT
    owner_id AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS owner_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
      AND c.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-10'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT b.new_owner AS owner_id
    FROM base b
  ) x
  GROUP BY owner_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.handled_cases DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-10'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    old_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM base
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT
    owner_id AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS owner_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
      AND c.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-10'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT b.new_owner AS owner_id
    FROM base b
  ) x
  GROUP BY owner_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.handled_cases DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
    AND ch.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-10'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    old_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM base
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT
    owner_id AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS owner_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2022-04-10'
      AND c.createddate <  DATE '2023-04-10'

WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.handled_cases DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    ch.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    ch.oldvalue__c AS old_owner,
    ch.newvalue__c AS new_owner
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  WHERE ch.field__c = 'Owner'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10 00:00:00'
    AND ch.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00'
    AND ch.oldvalue__c IS NOT NULL
    AND ch.newvalue__c IS NOT NULL
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    old_owner AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS transfer_count
  FROM base
  GROUP BY old_owner
), handled AS (
  SELECT
    owner_id AS agent_id,
    COUNT(*) AS handled_cases
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS owner_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate::timestamp >= TIMESTAMP '2022-04-10 00:00:00'
      AND c.createddate::timestamp <  TIMESTAMP '2023-04-10 00:00:00'
    UNION ALL
    SELECT b.new_owner AS owner_id
    FROM base b
  ) x
  GROUP BY owner_id
)
SELECT h.agent_id
FROM handled h
LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.agent_id = h.agent_id
WHERE h.handled_cases > 0
ORDER BY COALESCE(t.transfer_count,0) ASC, h.handled_cases DESC, h.agent_id ASC
LIMIT 1;
